request: Revise Unknown-Domain Scaffold Adversarial Test Suite v0.3 into v0.4.
instructions: Keep it buyer-safe, anonymized, and labeled as an internal draft stress-test suite, not a benchmark.

Add sharper workflow-integrity failure modes: permission drift, stale data acting as current data, silent policy violation, multi-system state mismatch, false final-state claim, rollback failure, human approval laundering, and ambiguous ownership after handoff.

Preserve scoring dimensions: provenance, observable_anchor, failure_column, proxy_honesty, claim_boundary, implementation_safety, workflow_traceability, human_review_trigger, operational_impact, recovery_path.
Make at least 15 of the 25 cases directly relevant to enterprise agentic workflow integrity.
Do not mention named AI models or vendors.
output_name: Unknown-Domain Scaffold Adversarial Test Suite v0.4 — Buyer-Safe Draft
